title: Senior Doctor - Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies:
Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies!
